# AEArrayType

**Type Alias**

Stores a value that specifies an array type.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias AEArrayType = Int8
```

## Discussion

You use this data type with the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/1445720-aegetarray] function and the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/1442535-aeputarray] function to specify an array type, using one of the constants from [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/apple_events/1542848-data_array_constants].
title: AEArrayType
